The '''GLiS Emergency Medpac''' or '''General Life-Sustaining Emergency Medpac''' was a basic [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]] manufactured by [[Chiewab Amalgamated Pharmaceuticals Company]]. It contained treatments for broken [[Bone/Legends|bones]], contusions, burns and traumatic injuries. It carried a variety of medicines that could be administered through a [[Hypospray|spray hypo]], as well as a [[Bone stabilizer/Legends|bone stabilizer]] and [[spray splint]]s for immobilizing and protecting broken bones.<ref name="EGWT" />

The medpac's [[Computer/Legends|computer]] stored information on treatment methods for one [[Species/Legends|species]] at a time, typically [[Human/Legends|Human]], but further program modules for thousands of other species could be purchased. The computer had a limited [[Diagnostic scanner/Legends|diagnostic scanner]] that allowed the user to monitor a patient's vital signs on a constant basis.<ref name="EGWT" />
